overall.description: Game engine footage from a bus simulator depicting a driver navigating through heavy rain in a European city. The bus stops at a designated stop to pick up passengers blocked by a delivery truck, then continues through urban traffic and intersections with active windshield wipers and wet road conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban arterial road with bicycle parking

agents.ego_description: driving the bus through heavy rain on a multi-lane urban road lined with trees and modern buildings

entered.detail: row of mature deciduous trees lining the left side of the street with green foliage
row of mature deciduous trees lining the right side of the street
modern multi-story commercial and residential buildings with glass facades
rain-soaked asphalt road surface with visible reflections and lane markings

segments.scene_description: The bus travels along a rain-soaked urban arterial road flanked by trees and modern buildings. Windshield wipers operate continuously as the vehicle approaches a bus stop area in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop with passenger shelter and bench

events.description: bus comes to a complete stop behind a delivery truck at the designated bus stop
bus doors open and passengers begin boarding from the shelter

agents.ego_description: stopped at bus stop to allow passengers to board, positioned behind a delivery truck

notable_agents.action: white DMD delivery truck stopped at the bus stop zone directly ahead of the bus
passengers waiting at the shelter and boarding the bus through the front door

entered.detail: glass and metal passenger shelter with transparent walls and a bench inside
vertical pole with bus route information and stop identification

segments.scene_description: The bus stops behind a delivery truck at a bus stop shelter. Passengers board the vehicle while heavy rain continues to fall, and the interior cabin lighting becomes visible as the doors open.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with construction barriers and parked vehicle lanes

events.description: bus accelerates away from the bus stop and pulls into the left lane
bus overtakes the DMD delivery truck on the left side

agents.ego_description: accelerating away from the stop and overtaking the delivery truck while navigating through light traffic

notable_agents.action: DMD delivery truck being overtaken and left behind on the right side of the road

entered.detail: orange temporary construction fencing lining the right side of the street
line of parked vehicles including sedans and vans along the right curb

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls away from the stop and overtakes the delivery truck. It continues past orange construction barriers and rows of parked cars along the wet street, with trees still lining the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

events.description: bus approaches intersection with multiple vehicles queued ahead at the traffic light
bus navigates through the intersection, turning slightly to follow the road curvature

agents.ego_description: navigating through a busy intersection with traffic lights, following a silver sedan through the junction

notable_agents.action: silver sedan ahead waiting at the intersection and then proceeding through
black car visible to the left waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal gantry with multiple lights controlling the intersection
zebra crossing markings painted on the asphalt at the intersection approach
taller commercial office buildings with modern facades surrounding the intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches and navigates through a busy urban intersection. Traffic lights and crosswalk markings become prominent as the vehicle moves through the junction with other cars, transitioning from the tree-lined street to a more commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked urban drive to a stationary stop amidst a bustling city street. It begins with the bus traveling along an arterial road flanked by trees and modern buildings, with windshield wipers operating continuously against the heavy downpour. As the vehicle slows, the perspective shifts from the open road toward a bus stop shelter in the distance. The scene then culminates as the bus comes to a halt behind a delivery truck, where the interior cabin lighting becomes visible as the doors open to let passengers board under the persistent rain.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a bus departs a roadside stop and navigates through a rain-slicked urban environment toward a busy commercial intersection. It begins by pulling away from the curb and overtaking a delivery truck, gliding past orange construction barriers and rows of parked cars along a wet street lined with trees. As the vehicle progresses, the tree-lined residential feel gives way to a more open city layout. The scene then shifts into a bustling junction, where the camera focuses on prominent traffic lights and white crosswalk markings while weaving through other cars. Finally, the movement concludes as the bus fully transitions from the quiet side street into the heart of a dense commercial district.
